hotel_name: The Scottsdale Resort and Spa, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Below average
reviews.negatives: They canceled our reservation.. no email.. no call.. nothing. Showed up at check-in to find out they overbooked and simply canceled our reservation. Barely apologetic, offered to put us up in a total crap “sister hotel”. Shocking the hotel didn’t even have the respect to call or email.. nope. Let my family arrive and wait in line to be told there was no room for us. Terrible experience.  We ended up staying for a night at the end of our stay when they had room. Hotel is fine. Average food. Average room that’s slightly worn down. Property is ok but nothing write home about.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Heavy thick smell of carpet fresh permeated the hallways and many of the rooms.

reviews.title: Not worth more than $150/ night in any season.
reviews.negatives: Beds uncomfortable, no complimentary tea access during the day, stinking hallways, expensive hotel with sparse amenities.

reviews.title: Just okay.
reviews.positives: Location was very good. Madames had a  delightful decor and ambience, with very friendly staff on both nights that we visited there.
reviews.negatives: Long walks to our rooms and carpet smelled overly strong with freshener.  Half used bottles of water and drinks were in the room when we arrived.  Security latch did not work.

reviews.title: Great resort, beautiful outside and inside
reviews.text:
The pros, gorgeous hotel, great pool and staff 
Cons are minor... tub didn’t drain well and ac didn’t work the first night but it got repaired the next day

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.positives: The property was very clean and its beautiful at night
reviews.negatives: Its a little outdated you can see it in the day time early at 6am in the morning there was loud noises from a remodeling going on in the room above it was annoying and we couldn't sleep .

reviews.title: Anniversary Trip
reviews.text: Beautiful resort!! Perfect for a weekend getaway with your spouse. Going to the spa today!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Ac didn't work it was very hot

reviews.title: Restful
reviews.text: We enjoyed every minute.  The grounds were so beautiful.  The employees work very hard.  We appreciated their hardwork.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queens Pool View Mobility Accessible Tub

reviews.title: Not coming back
reviews.negatives: For the price I don’t feel it’s worth it, the place his old and you can feel it and there are all types of strange smells. We paid 25 to park our own car no valet was up front left very early because I couldn’t sleep

reviews.title: Great Stay!
reviews.text: After a canceled flight we decided to take our kids on a staycation. This place was wonderful!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Housekeeping staff didn’t speak English.  Some days they never showed up until I called or chased them down.

reviews.title: Great place for Photoshoot & Stay
reviews.text: Had some new branding shots done here, great 'Council Room' , beautiful yards and room, super good food in the restaurant. All the staff is awesome, went overboard to help with our photoshoot too.

reviews.title: Decent but overpriced
reviews.negatives: The rooms seemed very basic and underwhelming considering the price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Noise at pool, Friday asked barman to turn down music. Saturday afternoon dj was too loud. Music had heavy base beat. Saturday night they showed movie , our room looked over pool, was annoyed.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Facility under construction and pool closed

reviews.title: Very enjoyable.
reviews.positives: Amount of food was very large. Too much for me
reviews.negatives:
Service at restaurants was a bit slow. Seemed to be short staffed. 

The rug in my room didn’t look clean

reviews.title: Relaxing oasis, good value for money
reviews.positives: Beautiful property, gorgeous landscaping and decor, very relaxing. Big focus on little details. Beds were comfy. Robes and slippers in rooms.
